title: Good Boy Crunchies Mini Chicken - Natural Dog Treats - Training Treats - Bulk Box - 8 x 60g
features: SERIOUS CRUNCH - Good Boy's Crunchies are a super fun treat, with a satisfying CRUNCH sound as your dog tucks in
NATURAL GOODNESS - made with delicious natural ingredients and no artificial colours, flavours and preservatives
OVER 30% CHICKEN BREAST - super tasty, super meaty flavour made with real chicken
PERFECT FOR SMALLER MOUTHS - Crunchies Minis are the perfect mini bites for smaller pups
description: From the manufacturer We know just how important it is to feed your dog the right treats for their size, age and breed. We also know how important treats are for making your dog super happy. So here at Good Boy we have a huge range of dog treats in all different shapes, flavours and sizes to suit every occasion of treating your dog. Why are Reward Treats so Paw-some? What better way to reward your doggo whilst training at home or out & about than with Good Boy’s reward dog treats? To answer your question simply, there isn’t one. Ridiculously tasty, instant gratification treats are a great way to reward your pooch – the tastier the better! And we’ve got you completely covered. Not only are our reward dog treats delicious, they’re nutritious too, made with natural meats and some even packed full of scrummy superfoods! Dog just love ’em. Crunchies Superlicious Meaty Sticks Real Meat Rewards Meaty Bites Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 156 4.7 out of 5 stars 381 4.6 out of 5 stars 150 4.6 out of 5 stars 10,294 4.5 out of 5 stars 18 Available in these tasty flavours Chicken, Mini Chicken, Duck, Mini Duck, Chicken & Cheese, Mini Chicken & Cheese, Peanut Butter, Mini Peanut Butter Chicken with Broccoli & Sweet Potato (sticks, bones), Chicken with Apple & Cranberry (sticks, bones), Duck with Broccoli & Sweet Potato (sticks, bones), Turkey with Brown Rice & Cranberry (sticks, bones) Variety Pack: Beef, Chicken, Peanut Butter, Duck, Triple Flavour Chicken & Calcium Bones, Chicken & Rice Bones, Chicken Dumbbells, Chicken Bites, Duck Bites, Beef Bites, Pigs in Blankets Lamb, Beef, Duck, Chicken Find your reward favourites: Scrumptious meaty chunks with a serious crunch Natural chicken, duck or turkey blended with scrummy superfoods Pocket-sized, ideal training treats Smaller bites, which are loved by smaller dogs or as training treats Super meaty bites for easy peasy training Love these reward treats? Find more favourites from Good Boy... Longer-Lasting Treats With tasty natural treats like whole pigs ears, natural rawhide shapes, or rawhide-alternative chews for all sizes of dogs - these treats are great for satisfying your dog's chewing instincts for longer. Natural Dental Treats Keep your dog's gnashers in tip-top condition with a daily dental chew. Dental dog treats promote teeth health, so they'll be grinning with delight! Real Meat Treats Tasty real meat treats are roasted in their natural juices to keep that delicious meaty flavour – meaning they’re super scrummy, nutritious and wholesome. With low fat, high protein and grain free choices - you're bound to find your pooch's perfect treat.
